name: Veal Oscar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix egg and water.
2. Mix bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
3. Coat veal with flour.
4. Dip veal into egg mixture; coat with bread crumb mixture.
5. Heat 2 tbsp margarine and 2 tbsp oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until hot.
6. Cook half of the cutlets in the margarine mixture, turning once, until done, about 10 minutes. Remove veal; keep warm.
7. Repeat with remaining margarine, oil, and veal.
8. Cook asparagus as directed on package; drain.
9. Prepare Hollandaise Sauce.
10. Place 3 to 4 asparagus spears on top of each cutlet; add some crabmeat and spoon sauce over top.
